name: harness
description: dancinlab harness — project-agnostic AI coding harness (governance hooks for Claude Code)

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: harness governance hooks — guards (force-push · tmp · handoff-scatter · doc-scatter · askq) + injects (commons · recommend · prefs · easy) + SessionStart (worktree gc · ing). Wires the global `harness` CLI into Claude Code; the CLI itself is installed separately (~/.harness/cli + ~/.local/bin/harness).
